The Cutting Edge · Est. 1994

Our Story

More Than
A Haircut

Founded in 1994, The Cutting Edge Barbershop has been a cornerstone of the Columbia, SC community for over three decades. Owner Nathaniel "Rev" Stewart brings passion, precision, and personality to every single visit.

"It's not just a cut — it's an experience." Our clients come back not just for the sharp fades and clean shaves, but for the conversation, the community, and the craft that keeps this art alive. Men, boys, and ladies are all welcome.

30+
Years Serving Columbia
1
Master Barber
★5
Star Rating

Meet the Owner

Nathaniel
"Rev" Stewart

Owner · The Cutting Edge Barbershop President · Palmetto State Barbers Association 30+ Years of Master Barbering

Rev Stewart isn't just a barber — he's a pillar of the Columbia community. As President of the Palmetto State Barbers Association, he advocates for the profession and its practitioners across South Carolina.

His shop is more than a place to get a cut. It's a welcoming, relaxing space where conversation flows, community thrives, and the craft is honored. Whether it's a fresh fade, a hot towel shave, or premium hair care products, Rev delivers excellence every time.

Book with Rev · (803) 771-4241

What We Do

Our Services

Book Now →
01
Precision Haircut

Classic and contemporary cuts tailored to your style — for men and boys. Every line sharp, every fade flawless.

02
Shape Up

Crisp edge work to keep your look defined and fresh between full cuts.

03
Hot Towel Razor Shave

A traditional hot towel straight razor shave — the gold standard of barbershop luxury.

04
Beard Trim & Sculpt

Expert sculpting and detailing to keep your beard looking intentional and well-maintained.

05
Ladies Welcome

The Cutting Edge welcomes everyone. Ladies are always welcome for trims, cuts, and styling services.

06
Hair Care & Skin Products

A great supply of premium hair care and skin care products available for purchase in-shop.

07
Cut & Shave Combo

The full experience — a precision cut followed by a traditional shave for the complete look.

08
Mobile Barber

Can't make it in? Ask about our mobile barbering service — we bring the craft to you.

09
All Latest Styles

Specializing in all the latest haircuts — fades, tapers, locs, waves, and more. We keep up so you stand out.

Beyond the Chair

Community & Advocacy

Rev Stewart takes his commitment beyond the barbershop — from speaking at the SC State House to organizing barbers across the state. The Cutting Edge is a hub of community, education, and professional excellence.
